seoMetaTitle: Power Integrations Solutions | Reference Designs & Applications | BeiLuo
seoMetaDescription: Power Integrations application solutions including AC-DC power supplies, LED lighting systems, motor drives, and gate drive solutions. Complete BOM and design support.

faqs.question: What application solutions does Power Integrations offer?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations offers comprehensive solutions for various applications: 1) AC-DC Power Supplies - High-efficiency adapters, chargers, and industrial power supplies using InnoSwitch, LinkSwitch, and TOPSwitch families. 2) LED Lighting - Complete driver solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial lighting with excellent dimming performance. 3) Motor Drives - BLDC motor control solutions for appliances and industrial applications using BridgeSwitch. 4) Gate Drive - Isolated gate driver solutions for IGBT and SiC MOSFET applications in motor drives and inverters.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution pages to find complete reference designs with BOM, schematics, and design files for your application.

faqs.question: How do I get started with a Power Integrations solution?
faqs.answer: Getting started with Power Integrations solutions involves: 1) Identify your application requirements - power level, input/output specifications, efficiency targets, 2) Select appropriate solution from our portfolio based on your needs, 3) Download reference design materials including schematic, BOM, and PCB layout, 4) Use PI Expert software to customize the design for your specifications, 5) Order evaluation board for prototyping and testing, 6) Contact our FAE team for design review and optimization. We provide comprehensive support from concept to production.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with our reference designs and use PI Expert software for customization. Contact our FAE team for design support.

solutions.name: Industrial Control Solution 1
solutions.description: Complete 35W high-efficiency power adapter solution using InnoSwitch3-CP with >92% efficiency and <30mW standby power. Meets DOE Level VI and CoC Tier 2 requirements.
solutions.longDescription:
The Industrial Control Solution 1 from power-integrations represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of power-integrations components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.

coreAdvantages.title: Global Compliance
coreAdvantages.description: Meets DOE Level VI and CoC Tier 2

customerCases.challenge: Design compact 35W USB-C PD charger with high efficiency and low standby power
customerCases.solution: Used INN3675C with InnoSwitch3-CP for high integration and efficiency
customerCases.results: Achieved 93% peak efficiency, <25mW standby power, 40% smaller than previous design
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.title: Design Considerations for High-Efficiency Adapters
faeInsights.content: When designing high-efficiency adapters with InnoSwitch3, key considerations include: 1) Transformer design - use PI Expert for optimized specifications, 2) Synchronous rectification - select SR FET with low RDS(on) and fast switching, 3) EMI filtering - compact common-mode choke for conducted EMI, 4) Thermal management - adequate copper area for heat dissipation, 5) USB PD controller - integrate for fast charging protocols. The InnoSwitch3's integrated protection features simplify safety compliance.
faeInsights.insight: When designing high-efficiency adapters with InnoSwitch3, key considerations include: 1) Transformer...
faeInsights.logic: This solution was selected based on efficiency requirements, cost considerations, and reliability needs.
keyTakeaways: Compact size enables high power density
commonPitfalls: Inadequate thermal design can reduce reliability
Poor layout can cause EMI issues
bestPractices: Use PI Expert for optimized design
Verify thermal performance under max load

faqs.question: What is the typical efficiency of the High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution?
faqs.answer: The High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution achieves typical efficiency of >92% at 230V AC under normal operating conditions. The high efficiency reduces thermal dissipation and improves reliability. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed efficiency curves and thermal design guidance.

faqs.question: What protection features are included in the High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution?
faqs.answer: The High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution includes comprehensive protection features including overvoltage protection (OVP), overcurrent protection (OCP), overtemperature protection (OTP), and short-circuit protection. These protections ensure safe operation under abnormal conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: All protection features are integrated and require no additional external components.

customerCases.challenge: Design 25W LED driver with high PF, low THD, and 0-10V dimming for commercial buildings
customerCases.solution: Used LNK418LG with LinkSwitch-PH for single-stage high-PF design
customerCases.results: Achieved 0.96 PF, 12% THD, smooth 1-100% dimming, 30% cost reduction vs two-stage design
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.title: Designing High-PF LED Drivers with LinkSwitch-PH
faeInsights.content: Key design considerations for LinkSwitch-PH LED drivers: 1) Inductor selection - critical for CRM operation and PF performance, 2) Input capacitor - balance between PF and ripple, 3) Dimming circuit - proper isolation and filtering for noise immunity, 4) Thermal design - adequate heatsinking for high ambient temperatures, 5) EMI compliance - proper filtering for conducted emissions. The single-stage design significantly reduces BOM cost while maintaining excellent power quality.

solutions.title: Automotive Electronics Solution 2

solutions.name: Motor Drive Solution
solutions.description: Complete BLDC motor drive solution using BridgeSwitch for high-efficiency, reliable motor control in appliances and industrial applications.
solutions.longDescription: The Motor Drive Solution from Power Integrations provides a complete, high-efficiency BLDC motor control system using BridgeSwitch integrated half-bridge ICs. This solution eliminates the need for external gate drivers and protection circuits, significantly reducing BOM count and PCB size while improving reliability. The integrated protection features include cycle-by-cycle overcurrent protection, overtemperature protection, and fault reporting, ensuring safe and reliable motor operation.

coreAdvantages.title: High Integration
coreAdvantages.description: Integrated gate drivers and protection reduce BOM by 50%

coreAdvantages.title: High Efficiency
coreAdvantages.description: >95% motor drive efficiency reduces power consumption

coreAdvantages.title: Reliable Operation
coreAdvantages.description: Built-in protection features ensure safe motor operation

coreAdvantages.title: Easy Design
coreAdvantages.description: Simple interface to microcontroller, no external drivers needed

keyComponents.description: BridgeSwitch 600V half-bridge with lower current rating

customerCases.challenge: Design reliable, efficient motor drive with minimal external components
customerCases.solution: Used BRD1265C BridgeSwitch for integrated motor drive solution
customerCases.results: Achieved 96% efficiency, 40% BOM reduction, passed all safety certifications
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.title: Design Considerations for BridgeSwitch Motor Drives
faeInsights.content: Key design considerations for BridgeSwitch motor drives: 1) Current sensing - use integrated sensing or external shunt, 2) Bootstrap supply - ensure adequate high-side supply, 3) Protection coordination - integrate with system-level protection, 4) Thermal design - adequate heatsinking for continuous operation, 5) EMI filtering - proper filtering for conducted emissions. The integrated protection features simplify safety compliance.
faeInsights.insight: BridgeSwitch integration significantly simplifies motor drive design while improving reliability.
faeInsights.logic: This solution was selected based on integration level, efficiency requirements, and reliability needs.
bestPractices: Verify thermal performance under max load

faqs.question: What motor types are supported by the Motor Drive Solution?
faqs.answer: The Motor Drive Solution supports BLDC (Brushless DC) and PMSM (Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor) types. Both sensorless and sensored control methods are supported. The BridgeSwitch ICs provide the power stage, while the control algorithm runs on an external microcontroller. Sensorless FOC (Field Oriented Control) and trapezoidal commutation are commonly used control methods.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for motor type selection and control algorithm recommendations.
